mapper.select:
SELECT rwo.id,rwo.work_order_no,rwo.mer_id,rwo.order_no,rwo.order_detail_id,rwo.reservation_date,rwo.reservation_time_slot, rwo.user_id,rwo.user_name,rwo.user_phone,rwo.user_address,rwo.longitude,rwo.latitude, rwo.service_staff_id,rwo.collaborator_ids,rwo.service_status,rwo.refund_status,rwo.clock_in_status,rwo.clock_in_photo, rwo.clock_in_remark,rwo.service_evidence_form_id,rwo.service_evidence_form,rwo.allocate_type,rwo.service_type,rwo.is_edit_allocate, rwo.is_edit_reservation,rwo.reservation_form_id,rwo.reservation_form_data,rwo.service_start_time,rwo.service_end_time,rwo.create_time,rwo.update_time FROM eb_reservation_work_order rwo LEFT JOIN eb_user u ON rwo.user_id = u.id WHERE rwo.mer_Id = #{merId}
AND rwo.service_status = 1 AND rwo.refund_status < 2
AND rwo.service_status = 2 AND rwo.refund_status < 2
AND rwo.service_status = 3 AND rwo.refund_status < 2
AND rwo.service_status = 4 AND rwo.refund_status < 2
AND rwo.refund_status = 2
AND rwo.work_order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{workOrderNo}, '%')
AND rwo.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{orderNo}, '%')
AND rwo.service_type = #{serviceType}
AND rwo.reservation_date BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}
AND ( rwo.user_id LIKE CONCAT('%',#{UserKeywords},'%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%',#{UserKeywords},'%') OR u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%',#{UserKeywords},'%') )
AND rwo.user_id = #{uid}
AND u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%',#{nickname},'%')
AND u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%',#{phone},'%')
ORDER BY rwo.id DESC

SELECT count(1) FROM eb_reservation_work_order rwo LEFT JOIN eb_user u ON rwo.user_id = u.id WHERE rwo.mer_Id = #{merId}
AND rwo.service_status = 1 AND rwo.refund_status < 2
AND rwo.service_status = 2 AND rwo.refund_status < 2
AND rwo.service_status = 3 AND rwo.refund_status < 2
AND rwo.service_status = 4 AND rwo.refund_status < 2
AND rwo.refund_status = 2
AND rwo.work_order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{workOrderNo}, '%')
AND rwo.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{orderNo}, '%')
AND rwo.service_type = #{serviceType}
AND rwo.reservation_date BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}
AND ( rwo.user_id LIKE CONCAT('%',#{UserKeywords},'%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%',#{UserKeywords},'%') OR u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%',#{UserKeywords},'%') )
AND rwo.user_id = #{uid}
AND u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%',#{nickname},'%')
AND u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%',#{phone},'%')

SELECT rwo.* FROM eb_reservation_work_order rwo LEFT JOIN eb_order_detail od on od.id = rwo.order_detail_id WHERE rwo.mer_Id = #{merId} AND rwo.service_type = 1 AND rwo.service_status = 1 AND rwo.refund_status < 2
AND ( rwo.work_order_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keywords},'%') OR rwo.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keywords},'%') OR od.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keywords},'%') )
ORDER BY rwo.id DESC

SELECT rwo.* FROM eb_reservation_work_order rwo LEFT JOIN eb_order_detail od on od.id = rwo.order_detail_id WHERE rwo.service_staff_id = #{staffId}
AND rwo.service_status = 2 AND rwo.refund_status < 2
AND rwo.service_status = 3 AND rwo.refund_status < 2
AND rwo.service_status = 4 AND rwo.refund_status < 2
AND rwo.refund_status = 2
AND ( rwo.work_order_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keywords},'%') OR rwo.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keywords},'%') OR od.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keywords},'%') )
AND rwo.reservation_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
ORDER BY STR_TO_DATE(rwo.reservation_date, '%Y-%m-%d') ASC, rwo.id DESC
ORDER BY STR_TO_DATE(rwo.reservation_date, '%Y-%m-%d') ASC, rwo.id DESC
ORDER BY rwo.id DESC
